hero.subline: Bookings, staff, and revenue — all organized, no spreadsheets, no missed appointments.

email.label: Enter your email
email.hint: Limited early-bird discount for first salons • Takes 10 seconds

cards.reviewQuote: “Finally an app that handles everything. My team switched from 3 different tools.”

pinned.meetBody: Everything your salon needs — bookings, team, and clients — finally working together in one simple system.
pinned.problemTitle: Your salon runs on too many disconnected tools
pinned.problemBody: Bookings in one app, client chats in another, staff schedules somewhere else — nothing works together, and it slows you down.

showcase.title: Everything in your salon, finally under control
showcase.body: Manage bookings, your team, and revenue from one place — simple, clear, and always under control.

smartBooking.title: Smart Booking Timeline
smartBooking.description: Live bookings, no-show flags, and staff load in one view so you can plan the day faster.

teamServices.title: Team & salon menu
teamServices.description: Add stylists, attach services with price and duration, and set weekly hours — what clients book stays aligned with your real team.

staffPerformance.title: Staff Performance Snapshot
staffPerformance.description: Track service revenue, rebooking rate, and productivity by team member — and see employee ratings in the same view, without jumping across tools.

salonAnalytics.title: Salon Analytics & Insights
salonAnalytics.description: Track ratings, identify loyal clients, and see which services drive repeat bookings — all in one dashboard.

workflow.body: Here’s how it feels to book with OneBeauty — from choosing your stylist to seeing your visits in one place.

01.title: Choose service and stylist
01.body: Start on the salon screen: browse services and prices, meet the team, pick the treatment you want, and choose your stylist.

02.title: Choose date and time
02.body: When you’re ready, flip through the calendar and tap a time that works for you. Slots are shown live for your stylist, so booking feels quick and straightforward.

03.title: Manage booking
03.body: Once you’re booked, you’ll land on a helpful summary: change details if you need to, add the visit to your calendar, and so much more.

04.title: Your bookings
04.body: Anytime, open Bookings to see what’s ahead or rate your past bookings. One simple list keeps what’s next and what you’ve done easy to find whenever you need it.

success.title: You’re on the list!
success.body: We’ll reach out when your salon’s spot is ready. Keep an eye on your inbox.

register.title: Early Registration Benefit
register.body: Register during this early access window and lock in exclusive lifetime benefits for your salon.

form.agree: I agree to receive updates about my founding salon benefits and early access.
form.finePrint: No payment required. We’ll contact you when onboarding begins.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Straightforward answers about OneBeauty, the waitlist, and what we're building for salons and teams.

what.a: OneBeauty is a workspace for modern salons: bookings, staff schedules, client history, and day-to-day operations in one place—built for teams that outgrew spreadsheets and paper.

waitlist.a: Salon owners and managers who want early access, product updates, and a chance to shape features before public launch. Stylists and independents are welcome too—we’ll match onboarding to your setup.

launch.a: We’re rolling out in stages to keep quality high. Waitlist members hear first about betas, pilot programs, and regional availability.

locations.q: Does it work for single-location salons?
locations.a: Yes. OneBeauty is designed to scale from a single chair or studio to multi-location groups without changing how your team works day to day.

mobile.q: Can staff use it on their phones?
mobile.a: The product is being built mobile-first where it matters—so stylists can check schedules, notes, and bookings without being tied to the front desk.

pricing.a: We’re finalizing simple, predictable plans for salons of different sizes. Waitlist subscribers will get early pricing and founding incentives when we open billing.

data.q: Is client and business data secure?
data.a: We treat salon and client data as sensitive by default: modern infrastructure, access controls, and practices aligned with what regulated industries expect. Details will be published in our security and privacy pages.

migrate.q: Can we migrate from our current tool?
migrate.a: We plan guided import paths for common calendars and client lists. Tell us what you use today when you join the waitlist so we can prioritize it.

support.q: What kind of support will you offer?
support.a: Helpful documentation, in-product guidance, and direct support for teams on paid plans. Early partners get closer access while we refine the experience.
